column1:
改对这句：
A veterinarian are educated than landscaper.
column2:
✅ Veterinarians are better educated than landscapers.

📖 比较级要有比较词：用 better educated（不是只说 educated）。另外泛指一类人用复数：veterinarians / landscapers。

例：
• Engineers are better paid than teachers.
• Cats are more independent than dogs.

column1:
改对这句：
you need to get high score
column2:
✅ you need to get a high score

📖 （助理补充）score 是可数单数，前面要加冠词 a：a high score。

例：
• You need a high score to pass.
• She got a perfect score on the test.

column1:
改对这句：
Become more a veterinarian.
column2:
✅ become a veterinarian

📖 这里不需要 more，多余了。表示“成为某职业”直接 become a + 职业。老师反复只回你 “Become.” 就是在提示去掉多余的词。

例：
• He wants to become a doctor.
• She became a teacher after college.

column1:
改对这句：
anyone went to the college can choose this major
column2:
✅ anyone who went to college can choose this major

📖 两点：1) 缺关系词 who 来连接定语从句；2) college 表示“上大学”这一概念时不加 the（go to college，类似 go to school）。

例：
• Anyone who finishes the course gets a certificate.
• He went to college in Beijing.

column1:
改对这句：
Sorry teacher, what's the public speaker?
column2:
✅ What's a public speaker?

📖 （助理补充）第一次问某类事物“是什么”，泛指，用不定冠词 a，不用 the。the 表示特指某个已知的对象。

例：
• What's a barista?
• What's a hedge fund?

column1:
改对这句：
I will company with them.
column2:
✅ I will accompany them.

📖 company 是名词（公司/陪伴），动词“陪某人”要用 accompany，且是及物动词，后面不加 with，直接跟宾语。

例：
• I'll accompany you to the hospital.
• She accompanied her mother to the market.

✅ stand-up comedian

📖 中文“脱口秀演员”对应的固定说法是 stand-up comedian，没有 public comedian 这个说法。

例：
• He's a famous stand-up comedian.
• I went to a stand-up comedy show last night.

column1:
改对这句：
I need to focus my English skills.
column2:
✅ I need to focus on my English skills.

📖 focus 作“专注于”时，固定搭配是 focus on something，介词 on 不能省。

例：
• Let's focus on the main problem.
• I'm focusing on my health this year.

column1:
改对这句：
they need to ask money for their parents
column2:
✅ they need to ask their parents for money / ask their parents for it

📖 搭配是 ask somebody for something（向某人要某物）。“向父母要钱”是 ask their parents for money，介词和语序都要对。

例：
• He asked his boss for a raise.
• Don't be afraid to ask me for help.

column1:
改对这句：
复合名词读成了分开的词：takeaway→“take her away”，popcorn→“pop a coin”，courthouse→“got our house”，textbook→“text the book”，eyeball→“I ball”。
column2:
✅ takeaway / popcorn / courthouse / textbook / eyeball —— 一个词、连读、不要拆开或加音。

📖 复合名词是一个整体，要连成一个词读，不要在中间塞进多余的音节或冠词。多听跟读原音，注意词的边界。

例：
• popcorn ['pɒpkɔːn]，不是 pop-a-corn
• textbook ['tekstbʊk]，不是 text-the-book

column1:
改对这句：
复合名词重音位置不稳。
column2:
✅ 大多数复合名词重音落在第一个词上：SUNflower, BASKETball, TOOTHpaste, AIRport。

📖 这正是本节课的重点。规律是“名词+名词”的复合名词，重音通常在前一个成分上。掌握它能让发音一下子地道很多。

例：
• 'AIRport（不是 air'PORT）
• 'TOOTHpaste（不是 tooth'PASTE）

column1:
改对这句：
Sorry teacher, what's the public speaker?
column2:
✅ Excuse me, could you explain what a public speaker is? / Sorry, what does "public speaker" mean?

📖 （助理补充）“Sorry teacher” 比较直译。礼貌打断/提问更自然的开头是 Excuse me 或 Sorry, 后面跟完整问句会更流利。

例：
• Excuse me, what does that word mean?
• Sorry, could you say that again?
